_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)
version_history: v3 (2026-05-17): retroactive editorial pass. Stage 3 (Codex) FAS=62 with 4 verified claims. Two major corrections: '15 years late' (INCORRECT) replaced with '~7 years 8 months past contractual April 2019 delivery'; 'twice the budget' (INCORRECT) replaced with '~1.23×' / 'cost rose from RM9.128B to RM11.22B'. Sea-trial language corrected per Stage 3: 'first sea-going on 28 Jan 2026' rather than 'sea trials began'. RM6 billion 2011 reference qualified — it was a pre-contract estimate; signed contract in July 2014 was RM9.128B. Indonesia comparison dropped (no Indonesian-government anchor located). MACC investigations claim sharpened: 'several named officers... One LCS-linked criminal case had a DNAA in March 2025'.

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — Headline 'First Ship in Sea Trials' → 'Maharaja Lela First Sea-Going Jan 2026' (Stage 3 distinguishes shipyard sea trials, first sea-going, and combat-system sea trials).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Context 'rose from RM6 billion to RM11.22 billion' → 'rose from RM9.128 billion (2014 signing) to RM11.22 billion' (the RM6B was pre-contract; signed contract was RM9.128B).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'began sea trials in January 2026' → 'first sea-going was on 28 January 2026' per Stage 3 distinction.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'delivery is finally arriving, more than a decade late' → '7 years 8 months past contractual April 2019 date'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Fact 1: 'Original 2011 budget RM6 billion' qualified as 'Earlier 2011 figures circulated near RM6 billion before contract'.

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Fact 2 'Multiple senior officers ... ongoing accountability cases' tightened to: 'Several named officers and former Boustead directors have faced MACC investigation. One LCS-linked criminal case had a DNAA in March 2025' (Stage 3 verified only one named prosecution).

REPHRASED (Stage 3): 'The 2022 PAC findings and subsequent referrals form the basis for ongoing accountability cases' → 'PAC findings preceded several public referrals. The relationship between PAC findings and any specific prosecution is procedural, not causal'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — Indonesia comparison dropped from Fact 3; only Singapore comparison retained (verified).

REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'capability gap ... most damaging legacy' opinion-framed → 'The delay created a capability gap relative to commissioned peer-navy assets' (factual, not interpretive ranking).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — Reframe '15 years late at twice the budget' → '7+ years past contractual delivery, contract value up ~23%' (the actual ratios).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — View '15 years for the first hull' → '7+ years past the April 2019 contractual delivery'.
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): December 2026 scheduled first delivery; programme reduced from six to five; PAC 2022 report; MOF Inc acquisition + renaming to Lumut Naval Shipyard 2024.
